level.requiresRole: Este nivel requiere aprobación del rol

messages.levelApproved: Nivel {{level}} aprobado. Avanzando al siguiente nivel.
messages.finalApproval: Aprobación final completada. El contenido está listo para publicar.

workflowAssignment.title: Aprobaciones asignadas
workflowAssignment.description: Estás viendo solo el contenido que requiere tu aprobación según tu rol o asignación en el flujo de trabajo. Los administradores pueden ver todo el contenido pendiente.

level.title: Level {{number}}: {{name}}
level.requiresRole: This level requires approval from role

messages.levelApproved: Level {{level}} approved. Advancing to next level.
messages.finalApproval: Final approval completed. Content is ready to publish.
messages.notYourTurn: You cannot approve at this level. Current level: {{currentLevel}}
messages.onlyRoleCanApprove: Only role {{role}} can approve at this level.
messages.workflowNotEnabled: Approval workflow is not enabled for this workspace.
messages.invalidStatus: Content must be in review status to be approved.
messages.insufficientPermissions: You do not have permission to perform this action.

workflowAssignment.title: Assigned Approvals
workflowAssignment.description: You are viewing only content that requires your approval based on your role or workflow assignment. Administrators can see all pending content.
